description: Marketing prompt pack — 4 prompts for content marketers and growth teams

prompts.title: Blog Post Outline
prompts.desc: Generate a structured blog post outline with a strong angle.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a B2B Content Strategist.
[TASK]    Generate a blog post outline for the topic below.
[STYLE]   Thought leadership focused. Technical depth over surface-level content.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Title, Target audience, Key thesis, 4-6 section headers with 2-3 bullet points each, Suggested CTA.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: LinkedIn Post
prompts.desc: Write a LinkedIn post with a strong hook that drives engagement.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a B2B content marketer.
[TASK]    Write a LinkedIn post based on the topic or insight below.
[STYLE]   Conversational, insightful, not corporate. Start with a hook. No hashtag spam.
[FORMAT]  3-5 short paragraphs. End with a question or CTA. Under 250 words.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Email Campaign Copy
prompts.desc: Write a B2B marketing email for a campaign or product launch.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a B2B email marketing specialist.
[TASK]    Write a marketing email for the campaign or product described below.
[STYLE]   Clear, benefit-led, no fluff. No exclamation marks.
[FORMAT]  Subject line, preview text, email body (under 200 words), single CTA button label.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Competitive Analysis Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise competitive intelligence into a clear comparison.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a product marketing manager.
[TASK]    Summarise the competitive information below into a clear comparison.
[STYLE]   Objective, factual, no hyperbole.
[FORMAT]  Comparison table: Feature/Dimension vs competitors. Follow with a 2-3 sentence positioning recommendation.
[INPUT]
